name: Solar Panel Installation Calculator
seo_description: Calculate kwp_necesario, paneles_ud with our free solar panel installation calculator. Just enter consumo_diario_kwh, hsp_dia, potencia_panel_w and get results
example_label: Calculate solar installation for daily consumption of 15 kWh with 4.5 HSP.

range_hints.consumo_diario_kwh: Consumo average diario of la vivienda
range_hints.hsp_dia: Horas Sol Pico according to ubicación: 3-6 HSP/día

result_context: To {consumo_diario_kwh} kWh/day with {hsp_dia} HSP se need {potencia_total_w}W of paneles ({paneles_ud} paneles of {potencia_panel_w}W). Baterías: {capacidad_kwh} kWh to 1 day.
formula_display: Power = consumption ÷ HSP; Paneles = power ÷ W_panel; Baterías = consumption × days
steps: Calculate power necessary: 15 kWh ÷ 4.5 HSP = 3.33 kW = 3333W
Baterías 1 day: 15 kWh × 1.20 = 18 kWh (Consider depth descarga 50%: 36 kWh)
mistakes: No Consider pérdidas of the system (inversor, cables, temperature)
Dimensionar batteries without Consider depth of descarga
No orientar paneles correctly (sur in hemisferio norte)
description: Solar PV system sizing based on consumption and peak sun hours.
desc: Solar Panel Installation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
